title: The Ambient Wild
lines: Hidden speakers nestled within the gargantuan, pulsing trees—long-abandoned by their human operators—continue to broadcast a distorted, skipping loop of synthesized jungle sounds that sound more like a mechanical death-rattle.

The artificial chirps of birds and the tectonic roars of predators are layered with the digital crackle and low-frequency hum of a dying terminal. It is a haunting, synthesized orchestra of a civilization that has been consumed by the absolute outside.

The winding concrete paths ahead fork into deep, expectant shadow. One path carries the metallic tang of ozone and the oppressive scent of heat; the other leads toward a cold, rhythmic blue light that pulses like a dying star.

options.desc: 1. Follow the oppressive scent of ozone and heat
2. Follow the cold, rhythmic blue light
3. Return to the cyclopean main gate
